title: morisonia hastata
intro: Morisonia hastata, also known as the wild jasmine or climbing jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Morisonia hastata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Morisonia hastata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the flowers in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
